rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admission, Form Interrogatories, And For Monetary And Issue Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Kaiser Foundation Hospitals¿ motion to compel Plaintiffs¿ further responses to special interrogatories, requests for admission, form interrogatories and for monetary and issue sanctions: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:15am in Dept. 503. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion That Requests For Admissions To Friedman Brothers Home Improvement Centers Be Deemed Admitted
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 4. Plaintiffs¿ motion that requests for admissions to Friedman Brothers Home Improvement Centers be deemed admitted and request for sanctions: After considering the moving papers, oral argument and all supplemental papers that have been submitted after the October 11 hearing, plaintiffs¿ motion that the requests for admission be deemed admitted is denied and plaintiffs¿ request for sanctions is granted. Although no opposition was initially filed, the court sees on Lexis that defendant served responses prior to the hearing on this motion, so the court will not deem the requests admitted. (C.C.P. § 2033.280(c).). Plaintiffs¿ request for sanctions against defendant¿s counsel is granted in the amount of $861 pursuant to C.C.P. § 2033.280(c), which imposes mandatory sanctions when failure to serve a timely response necessitated the motion. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:15am in Dept. 503. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: DOLYE D GREEN et al VS. ASBESTOS COMPANIES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For A Protective Order To Limit The Deposition Of Plaintiff Doyle Green
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 19, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 5. Plaintiffs¿ motion for a protective order to limit the deposition of Doyle Green: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:15am in Dept. 503. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
